_doc: Raw-color allowlist. Each entry pairs a colon-separated repo-relative path with the literal raw-color tokens permitted at that site. The scanner ignores any hex code or color keyword inside these files OR matching the listed values. See https://docs.cinatra.ai/references/design/ for the policy.
_format: files: glob patterns whose hits are fully ignored (file-level allowlist). values: hex / oklch / named values that are always ignored regardless of file (color-value allowlist).
